docs.name: Autocomplete Search
docs.description: Accessible combobox with debounced filtering, async-ready search, full keyboard navigation, grouped options, matched-text highlighting, and loading / empty / error states.

props.name: options
props.description: Static option list for synchronous local filtering. Ignored when onSearch is provided.

props.name: onSearch
props.description: Async resolver returning matches for a query. Enables async mode with loading/error states and a stale-response guard.

props.name: onSelect
props.description: Called when an option is chosen via click or Enter.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Input placeholder; also used as the combobox/listbox accessible name.

props.name: debounceMs
props.description: Delay before filtering (sync) or fetching (async) after the last keystroke.

props.name: minChars
props.description: Minimum characters before a search runs. Below this, results are cleared and hintMessage (if set) shows.

props.name: emptyMessage
props.description: Shown when a search completes with zero matches.

props.name: loadingMessage
props.description: Shown in async mode while onSearch is pending.

props.name: hintMessage
props.description: Shown when the query length is below minChars. Only rendered if provided.

props.name: theme
props.description: Theme for default input and dropdown colors.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional classes merged onto the root wrapper.

variants.label: Static filtering
Grouped options
Async remote search

docs.overview: AutocompleteSearch is an accessible combobox following the W3C APG editable-combobox-with-list-autocomplete pattern. Pass a static `options` array for synchronous local filtering, or an async `onSearch` resolver for remote search — the latter debounces requests and guards against stale responses overwriting newer queries. Typing is debounced (300ms by default), the matched substring is highlighted in each result, and consecutive options sharing a `group` render as labelled sections. Keyboard support: ArrowUp/ArrowDown move the active option (wrapping), Enter selects, Escape closes then clears. It exposes combobox/listbox/option roles with aria-activedescendant and a polite live region, honors prefers-reduced-motion, and is SSR-safe.

scenarios.title: Filter a static list
scenarios.description: Pass an options array for instant, debounced local filtering with matched-text highlighting — no network needed.

scenarios.title: Grouped command menu
scenarios.description: Give options a `group` to render labelled sections (role="group"); keyboard navigation flows across groups seamlessly.

scenarios.title: Async remote search
scenarios.description: Provide onSearch to fetch results from an API. Requests are debounced and stale responses are discarded, with built-in loading, empty, and error states. Use minChars + hintMessage to defer searching until enough is typed.

accessibility.screenReaderNotes: Follows the W3C APG editable combobox with list autocomplete: the input has role=combobox with aria-autocomplete=list, aria-expanded, aria-controls, and aria-activedescendant pointing at the highlighted option while DOM focus stays on the input. The popup is a role=listbox with role=option children setting aria-selected; grouped results use role=group with an accessible name. A polite aria-live status region announces result counts, loading, empty, and error states. ArrowUp/ArrowDown navigate (wrapping), Enter selects, Escape closes then clears; Home/End keep their native text-cursor behavior.
